subject: Geography
overall_learning_objectives: Explain the concept and characteristics of resources
Analyze different classifications of resources with examples
Understand the concept of sustainable development and its importance
Examine the process and importance of resource planning in India
Interpret land use patterns and factors affecting land utilization
Investigate causes of land degradation and methods of conservation
Compare different soil types and explain soil conservation methods

lesson_plan.title: Concept of Resources
topics_covered: Relationship between nature, technology and institutions
teaching_strategy: Discussion on resources used in daily life
Questioning to connect human activities with resource use
student_activities: Identify ten resources used at home or school
Classify them as natural or human-made resources

lesson_plan.title: Classification of Resources
student_activities: Prepare a classification table of resources

lesson_plan.title: Sustainable Development
topics_covered: Environmental issues due to resource exploitation
student_activities: Discuss ways to reduce resource wastage

lesson_plan.title: Resource Planning in India
teaching_strategy: Use of maps and regional examples

lesson_plan.title: Land as a Resource and Land Use Pattern
teaching_strategy: Discussion on agricultural and urban land use
student_activities: Observe land use types in the locality
Prepare a simple land use list

lesson_plan.title: Land Degradation and Conservation
student_activities: List causes of land degradation in India

lesson_plan.title: Soils of India and Soil Conservation
student_activities: Label soil types on India map
Draw and label a soil profile

teaching_aids: Charts of soil types and land use
teacher_tip: Encourage students to relate environmental issues in their locality to concepts like resource conservation and sustainable development.
